title: Land availability + currently-open incentives (cross-repo linkage)
purpose: Give an investor the two operational facts the earlier layers implied but never joined: WHERE developed industrial land is actually vacant, and WHICH incentive windows are open right now — plus the repos each fact is sourced from.

related_repositories.provides: Industrial land availability (IILB vacant developed-park land, 37 states) + pending-IEM demand match + supply/demand scenarios
FCI depot / storage footprint (478 depots, 5 zones) — physical agri-logistics infrastructure behind Food Processing & AIF incentives
DGFT EIDB chapter-wise export/import flows — reveals which incentivized sectors are import-heavy (substitution targets) vs export-strong
related_repositories.links_to_layer: 16 target shortlist (China PN3 substitution), 06 investor map

related_repositories.provides: Global company pools per incentivized sector
State DISCOM financial health — power-cost/reliability context for siting decisions under RDSS
Descriptive trade baselines feeding sector prioritisation

land_availability.coverage: 37 states/UTs, 4,240 parks, 125,602 vacant plots (Rajasthan plot count capped at 55,000; parks/area unaffected)
land_availability.definition: available_area = vacant developed-park land in Ha. API returns VACANT plots only -- this is the available-supply measure by construction.
land_availability.caveat: Central IILB counts VACANT developed-park land only; states hold larger undeveloped banks (portals listed). Per-parcel geometry only from Odisha ArcGIS.

windows.window: MPMS approved 15-Jul-2026; application window pending notification

windows.funds_allocated: within MeitY PLI head (FY27 PLI BE cut 78% to Rs 1,527cr)
ISM-1 Rs 76,000cr; Semicon 2.0 Rs 1.27L cr approved 15-Jul-2026 (FY27 operational allocation Rs 1,000cr)
Rs 22,919cr (Mar-2025) -> Rs 40,000cr (Budget FY27); FY27 BE Rs 1,500cr
Rs 17,490cr of Rs 19,744cr mission; FY27 mission allocation Rs 600cr (+100%)

windows.window: e-2W claims close 31-Jul-2026; e-3W to 31-Mar-2028; L5 closed 26-Dec-2025

windows.funds_allocated: Rs 1L cr facility; FY27 BE Rs 910cr (subvention outgo)
Rs 69,725cr total = SBFAS 24,736 + MDF 25,000 (incl. IIF 5,000) + SbDS 19,989
Rs 1L cr central assistance (FY26-FY31); FY26 Rs 10,000cr
Rs 1L cr corpus (50y interest-free to ANRF SPF); FY26 Rs 20,000cr
Rs 8,500cr (2024 scheme; percentage formula DISPUTED between sources -- official PDF is arbiter) + Rs 37,500cr surface-gasification (2026)

linked_insight.statement: A company eligible for a sector-agnostic open central incentive (Semicon/ISM 2.0, ECMS, ELI, RDI, AIF) can site in the land-rich states without a land constraint; heavy-industry pipelines face the deficit flagged in india-trade-sector-policy-recommendations's supply/demand scenarios.
linked_insight.cross_ref: See india-trade-sector-policy-recommendations land_supply_demand_scenarios for the land-intensity swing factor.
